title: EquipmentSuggestInput
description: Given a target batch size and a brewery setup type, recommend vessel capacities, losses, and rates to seed an equipment profile.

setup_type.description: three_vessel: HLT + mash tun + kettle (HERMS-style). two_vessel: mash tun + kettle, kettle doubles as HLT for heating sparge water. biab: brew in a bag — single kettle holds full-volume mash and the boil, no HLT or mash tun.

batch_size_l.description: Target fermenter volume after losses, in liters. Drives every other capacity.

target_og.description: Expected original gravity to size the mash tun against. Defaults to 1.060 — covers most pale ales / IPAs without short-changing high-gravity brews enough to matter.

efficiency_pct.description: Expected brewhouse efficiency, used to estimate grain mass from target OG.

boil_time_min.description: Standard boil duration. Drives boil-off volume and therefore pre-boil / kettle sizing.
